infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is required to scan QR codes for clock-in and clock-out.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location access is used to show nearby shifts and verify shift locations.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Calendar access lets you import shifts and sync your schedule.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Calendar access lets you import shifts and sync your schedule.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: Calendar access lets you import shifts and sync your schedule.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Reminders access lets you optionally create shift reminder entries.
infoPlist.NSRemindersFullAccessUsageDescription: Reminders access lets you optionally create shift reminder entries.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Notifications keep you updated about shifts and schedule changes.
